_comment: Add finished renders here. type: video | image | note. Copy media files into gallery/media/ (gitignored) and reference them as media/<file>.

items.title: Circular Accumulator
items.description:
One circle per note, accumulating over the piece. Angle = start time (counterclockwise from top), radius from center = pitch vs middle C, size = sounding duration. Opaque core grows while the key is held; translucent halo keeps growing while the sustain pedal carries the note.

Render the demo:
npm run render -- --timeline samples/prelude_c.timeline.json
